name: Beetle
description: A Dahl SMG locked to incendiary damage, built around steady fire and reliable burn application while leveling. Its Maliwan-style barrel improves elemental chance and burn damage for its level, though it is harder to find than its rarity color suggests because relatively few valid part combinations can produce it.
notes: Other Dahl fixed-element SMGs in the same subset include the Eel, Jackal, and Scorpion.
